items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: In the most recent episode of Club 520, NBA vet Anthony Morrow tells the incredible story of how he made the NBA despite being undrafted in 2008 and having to play in THREE DIFFERENT NBA SUMMER LEAGUES that offseason. Morrow's agent would not accept a $140,000 to play in Ukraine…

items.title: Walker Kessler averaged 14.4 points, 10.8 rebounds, 1.4 steals, 1.8 blocks, and 1.2 3s last season through five games
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Walker Kessler averaged 14.4 points, 10.8 rebounds, 1.4 steals, 1.8 blocks, and 1.2 3s last season through five games

And then he got season-ending shoulder surgery

Asked Kessler about how he is feeling and how he can build on the start of last season

"The heart grows fond in absence"

items.title: Sandro Mamukelashvili has started 28 games in his NBA career. Asked him about what it will take to meet expectations as a possible starter
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Sandro Mamukelashvili has started 28 games in his NBA career. Asked him about what it will take to meet expectations as a possible starter 

"I don't know how it's all gonna play out. But I just think throughout my five years in the league, I've matured enough, I understand how to play this game"

items.title: Per a league source, Tracy McGrady’s statement on his podcast that he does not “think there’s been a conversation” between Jaylen Brown and Joel Embiid since the blockbuster trade is not true. They have spoken, the source said.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Per a league source, Tracy McGrady’s statement on his podcast that he does not “think there’s been a conversation” between Jaylen Brown and Joel Embiid since the blockbuster trade is not true. They have spoken, the source said.

items.title: The Denver Nuggets signed Trevon Brazile to a 4-year, $9.3 million deal, which includes the first two seasons fully guaranteed, league sources told HoopsHype. Brazile was the 35th pick of the 2026 NBA Draft out of Arkansas. He was acquired in a trade with the San Antonio Spurs.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Denver Nuggets signed Trevon Brazile to a 4-year, $9.3 million deal, which includes the first two seasons fully guaranteed, league sources told HoopsHype. Brazile was the 35th pick of the 2026 NBA Draft out of Arkansas. He was acquired in a trade with the San Antonio Spurs.

items.title: Asked Austin Reaves what reinforced his desire to remain with the Lakers
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Austin Reaves what reinforced his desire to remain with the Lakers 

"I just think it's the organization, the coaching staff, obviously my relationship with the guys on the team last year and then Luka, he's one of my best friends on this planet. I talk to him almost every single day"
